title: Reproducibility Package for 'Longitudinal assessment of research in GIScience domain shows a positive impact of reproducible research practices'
description: This is the data and software repository to support the computational analysis related to the paper Longitudinal assessment of research in GIScience domain shows a positive impact of reproducible research practices
